synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19589 Oracle Linux 9 fapolicyd bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19589
description:
[1.3.3-106.0.1.1]
- Increase db_max_size to 100M

[1.3.3-106.1]
- RPMDB crashes with SIGBUS when updating the RPMDB repeatedly
- Add /var/lib/fapolicyd to tmpfiles
- File /run/fapolicyd differs from RPM expectations
- fapolicyd.service badly instructs how to start after nss-user-lookup.target
- fapolicy rule containing 'pattern=normal' produces error
- "fapolicyd-cli --file add" crashes when processing sockets
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19589

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19589.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
fapolicyd-1.3.3-106.0.1.el9_6.1.x86_64.rpm
fapolicyd-selinux-1.3.3-106.0.1.el9_6.1.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
fapolicyd-1.3.3-106.0.1.el9_6.1.aarch64.rpm
fapolicyd-selinux-1.3.3-106.0.1.el9_6.1.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/fapolicyd-1.3.3-106.0.1.el9_6.1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.3.3-106.0.1.1]
- Increase db_max_size to 100M

[1.3.3-106.1]
- RPMDB crashes with SIGBUS when updating the RPMDB repeatedly
- Add /var/lib/fapolicyd to tmpfiles
- File /run/fapolicyd differs from RPM expectations
- fapolicyd.service badly instructs how to start after nss-user-lookup.target
- fapolicy rule containing 'pattern=normal' produces error
- "fapolicyd-cli --file add" crashes when processing sockets
